title: Quadlet - fix trailing whitespaces handling
body:
Remove all trailing white spaces from all lines before the line by line processing
Add test

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
No

```release-note
None
```

Resolves: #21109

comments.body: @edsantiago I need your help here. The issue that triggered this PR is a case of a trailing space. As part of the fix, I wrote a test unit file that includes a trailing white space. But, the basic tests are failing because of the trailing space. What should I do?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg*, *ygalblum* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg,ygalblum] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> @edsantiago I need your help here. The issue that triggered this PR is a case of a trailing space. As part of the fix, I wrote a test unit file that includes a trailing white space. But, the basic tests are failing because of the trailing space. What should I do?

Never mind, I've found the solution
@vrothberg I change the implementation of the method that clears trims the lines (both because it made the unit test fail and because now it's simpler and cannot return an error)

I was working on a different patch to throw an error in this situation. But this looks fine.
/lgtm
